violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Employee had an open drinking glass in the same area he was preparing food.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Faucet over the 3 compartment sink was leaking at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors underneath the kitchen equipment and underneath the dry storage racking in the basement need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor leading from the bar to the kitchen area has a hole and raised trim being held with duct tape.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Employee drinks were without lids while sitting in the prep area.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. In the basement walk-in cooler raw ground beef was being stored above raw whole cuts of meat.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop handles were laying in the ice tub located in the bar.

General equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of equipment did not meet a design characteristic specified in the food service code. Chicken is being portioned into black containers, needs to be placed in a light colored container to recognize when it needs cleaning. Cutting board located next to the grill needs to be resurfaced.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling and wall by the 3 compartment sink needs cleaning. Floors in the basement need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Holes in the flooring leading from the bar to the kitchen.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
